evals.prompt: 회원가입 → 대시보드 → 로그아웃까지 전체 플로우 E2E 테스트 만들어줘. 앱은 http://localhost:3000 에서 돌아가고 있어.
evals.expected_output: guard/auth/signup-to-logout.spec.ts 생성, /signup → /dashboard → logout → /login route 전환 체인 검증, 상태 유지 검증 포함
expectations: Reads skills/guard-e2e-test/SKILL.md via Read tool
Reads references/e2e-conventions.md for locator and assertion rules
Reads references/agent-browser-patterns.md for browser exploration patterns
Detects existing playwright.config.ts and test conventions in features/next-app
Explores the running app via agent-browser before writing tests
Invokes Playwright MCP tools (browser_navigate, browser_snapshot) at least once BEFORE any Write/Edit tool call for .spec.ts — verifiable by checking tool call order in transcript
Creates .spec.ts under guard/ subdirectory in features/next-app/tests/
Test describe block has [Guard] prefix
Test names include journey_id [JOURNEY-AUTH-001]
Includes happy flow scenario: /signup → fill form (signup-name, signup-email, signup-password, signup-confirm-password) → submit → /dashboard
Includes state persistence scenario: reload on /dashboard → greeting element still visible
Includes state teardown scenario: verifies localStorage/sessionStorage/cookies are actually cleared after logout (page.evaluate + context.cookies pattern)
Includes branch flow scenario: unauthenticated /dashboard access → redirect to /login
Uses data-testid locators (signup-submit, nav-logout, greeting, etc.)

evals.prompt: 로그인 → 대시보드에서 할 일 추가 → /todos에서 완료 처리 → 대시보드 통계 반영 확인까지 전체 플로우 회귀 테스트 만들어줘. localhost:3000에서 실행 중이야.
evals.expected_output: guard/todo/dashboard-to-todos-flow.spec.ts 생성, /login → /dashboard → /todos → /dashboard route 전환 + todo 상태 cross-page 동기화 검증
expectations: Reads skills/guard-e2e-test/SKILL.md via Read tool
Explores /login, /dashboard, /todos routes via agent-browser
Invokes Playwright MCP tools (browser_navigate, browser_snapshot) at least once BEFORE any Write/Edit tool call for .spec.ts — verifiable by checking tool call order in transcript
Creates .spec.ts under guard/todo/ directory in features/next-app/tests/
Test covers full route chain: /login → /dashboard → quick add todo → /todos → complete todo → /dashboard → stat-completed updated
Verifies todo state persists across route transitions (dashboard ↔ todos)
Verifies stat-total, stat-completed, stat-pending reflect correct counts after operations
Includes data-state branch flow: adding a todo without completing it leaves stats counter unchanged
Includes branch flow: navigate to /todos without login → redirect to /login
Uses data-testid locators (todo-input, todo-add, todo-checkbox-{id}, stat-total, stat-completed, nav-todos, nav-dashboard)
Does NOT write single-screen tests (per-screen todo validation is plan-e2e-test scope)

evals.prompt: 로그인 → 프로필 수정 (이름, 스킬 선택) → 저장 → 대시보드 인사말 반영 확인 → 프로필 재진입 시 데이터 유지 확인 플로우 테스트 만들어줘. http://localhost:3000 에서 확인 가능해.
evals.expected_output: guard/profile/profile-update-flow.spec.ts 생성, /login → /profile → edit → save → /dashboard → /profile route 전환 + 데이터 영속성 검증
expectations: Reads skills/guard-e2e-test/SKILL.md via Read tool
Explores /login, /profile, /dashboard routes via agent-browser
Invokes Playwright MCP tools (browser_navigate, browser_snapshot) at least once BEFORE any Write/Edit tool call for .spec.ts — verifiable by checking tool call order in transcript
Creates .spec.ts under guard/profile/ directory in features/next-app/tests/
Test covers full route chain: /login → /dashboard → /profile → edit → save → /dashboard → /profile
Verifies profile data persists: after save, navigate to /dashboard, greeting shows updated name
Verifies profile data persists: re-enter /profile, edited name/skills still present
Uses data-testid locators (profile-edit-btn, profile-name, profile-skills-toggle, profile-save, profile-saved, greeting)
Includes branch flow: unauthenticated /profile access → redirect to /login
Each test is independently runnable (unique email per test, no shared state)
Runs playwright test to verify generated tests pass
